lessons.title: What is R? Installing R and RStudio
lessons.description: Learn about R, its ecosystem, and how to set up R and RStudio on your computer.

lessons.title: Your First R Code: Console and Scripts
lessons.description: Write and run your first R commands using the console and script files.

lessons.title: Basic Arithmetic and Variables
lessons.description: Perform calculations and store values in variables.

lessons.title: Comments and Code Organization
lessons.description: Use comments to document your code and keep it tidy.

lessons.title: Getting Help and Exploring R Environment
lessons.description: Learn how to access R's built-in help and manage your workspace.
